sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
for node in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if node['color'] == 'S':
        b = node['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"Blue square id={node['id']} bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")

# Let me look at the black shape structure more carefully
# I want to find "pockets" or "chambers" where blue squares could fit
# Let me look at the ascii around rows 14-23 where there might be eye sockets
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(13, 24):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][9:54]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Eye area (rows 14-18) - where there are two black regions separated by YYYOO
- Nose/mouth area (rows 19-38)

- Rows 19-23: The black shape has a wider gap (YYYYYYYOOOOOO)
- Rows 24-28: Even wider gap
- Rows 29-38: Narrow gap again
- Rows 39-43: Wider gap
- Rows 44-53: Narrow gap (YYYOO)
